digest.component_or_area: plan-review-gate ground-truth corpora (mining, adjudication, kappa validity gate)
propositions: Two plan-review ground-truth corpora (outcome + finding-adjudication) must be mined, frozen, and versioned under runs/ with a documented README, changing no code under src/.
The §5 SOTA report is recovered verbatim from commit 143d5074e and committed as the provenance baseline against which --verify-s5 re-derives §5 figures marked AGREES or CORRECTED-TO per figure.

Outcome-corpus rows are derived by exact event predicates (reopen_count from STATUS closed→open, force_close from FORCE_CLOSE: comment, completion_verifier_fail_count from COMPLETION_VERDICT, review_round_count from all_review_results) with a mandatory ≥500 completeness floor.

On-disk active+.retired event scanning is insufficient for compacted tickets, so a git-object walk across the tickets branch (plus SNAPSHOT compiled_state) is the required recovery path for ticket_type/level/status history.

Adjudication findings are bucketed as surfaced vs dropped by positional coverage.counts segments (not by the ambiguous decision field), stratified by criterion, targeting ~300 surfaced + ~100 dropped with a ≥280/≥90 floor.

LLM A/B Cohen's kappa decayed with sample size to ~0.5, so the kappa≥0.7 pass/fail gate is replaced by honest stratified kappa disclosure plus authoritative human adjudication of clustered dispute archetypes as final gold labels.
